email_text:
Hello Team,

On Thursday, March 5th, we will be hosting a workshop for a group of potential clients. We expect around 18 participants including some external guests. I was wondering if we could reserve the Orange Room from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM for this?

Additionally, we would like to provide a light lunch, perhaps sandwiches and salads. Could you also arrange some coffee and tea for the morning session? 

Please let me know if this is doable. Looking forward to your reply!

Thanks in advance!

Hi Hospitality,

I am organizing a tech talk for our team on Monday, April 14th. We would like to have this at the Wibaut office and expect around 25 people.

Could you please assist in reserving a suitable room for the entire afternoon, starting around 1:00 PM? We also plan on having a meal afterwards, perhaps some pizzas or something easy. 

Let me know what options are available. I apologize for the late notice.

Thanks!

Good morning,

We have a partner event scheduled for Wednesday, July 22. It's quite an important meeting involving several stakeholders from Xebia and from our partner company, SAP.

I think we'll need a space capable of seating about 15 people and possibly some AV equipment for presentations. The event will run from 2:00 PM to 6:00 PM.

Could you also arrange some refreshments and snacks? And maybe advise on a good spot for a post-meeting dinner?

Thanks a lot and sorry for the lack of specifics!

Hi there,

I need to book a space for a last-minute strategy session this Friday, May 8th. We will have 7 team members attending. Do you think the Paris Room is available for this?

We'd also appreciate some lunch around 12:30 PM. Something simple, like wraps and salads, would be great. There is one gluten-free attendee that we need to accommodate.

Apologies for the short notice and thank you for your help!

Hi Team,

I hope you’re doing well. I’m looking to host a client engagement session on June 10th. We’re aiming for around 20 attendees, including some visitors from Ericsson.

Would it be possible to reserve the Grand Café for this? The event will be from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. We’ll also need some lunch catered, something like a buffet with multiple dietary options if possible.

If there are any issues or additional details you need from me, please let me know.

Thanks in advance!

Good morning Hospitality Team,

We are looking to host a leadership workshop on Thursday, September 15. We anticipate around 18 attendees, a mix of internal and external stakeholders. Can we reserve the A202 room for this?

Would it be possible to arrange a light lunch around 12:30? I think a selection of salads and wraps should suffice. I’ll confirm dietary requirements by Tuesday.

Also, could we have a projector set up in the room? Please let me know if this is feasible.

Thanks a lot!

Hi Team,

I hope you’re well! We’re setting up a client workshop on Thursday, March 10, and we’re expecting about 25 participants. The event will be held at the Hilversum office.

I apologize for the short notice, but could we organize a simple breakfast for when they arrive at 9:00 AM? Maybe some pastries and coffee in the meeting room?

Please let me know if this can be arranged.

Best regards,

Hello Hospitality,

We're planning a strategy session on Monday, October 3rd. The session will run from 10:00 to 3:00 PM in the G110 room.

Could you arrange lunch for around 15 people? A mix of sandwiches and a fruit platter would be great. I’ll send over dietary preferences soon, but there might be a gluten-free request.

If there's anything else you need from my side, please let me know.

Thanks in advance!

Hoi!

I just realized I forgot to ask, but on Thursday, July 7th, we'll need to host a roundtable discussion at the Laap office. We should expect about 10 guests, including colleagues and a few from our partner, TechAdvantage.

Can you prepare the Paris room and arrange for some refreshments like coffee, tea, and perhaps a few snacks throughout the day?

Thanks for your help, and apologies for the late notice!

Regards,

Hi Hospitality,

We're planning an internal training session on Friday, August 20th, and need to reserve a space at the Wibaut office. Could we use the training room II from 2:00 PM to 5:00 PM?

Lunch is not required, but could you set up a coffee station nearby? We're expecting around 12 people.

Thanks a lot for your assistance. Let me know if you need further details.

Best,

Morning,

We have a client workshop scheduled for May 18. The client is KLM, and we expect around 15 people. Could we arrange a simple lunch with sandwiches and salads in the Grand Cafe? Also, could you reserve a table for the group?

Sorry for the late notice, I just confirmed the details. If you need any more info, let me know!

Thanks!

Hi Team,

We are planning a strategy meeting for Tuesday, July 7 at our Utrecht office. We should kick off around 09:00 and wrap up by 15:00. Could we have a light breakfast ready for about 18 people and lunch with a vegetarian option?

The meeting will be in room B201. I haven’t gotten all dietary preferences yet, but I’ll pass them along as soon as I have them.

Thanks for the help!

Hello,

On June 14, we want to run a coding bootcamp at the Amsterdam office. Can we use Training Room A for the day? We'll need it from 10:00 to 17:00. Also, could you arrange for some snacks and drinks to be available throughout the day?

Expecting around 25 attendees, mostly internal folks but a few from our partner company as well. Let me know if there are any issues!

Best,

Hi Hospitality,

We're planning a leadership team lunch on Friday, April 21. It'll be a small group, just 8 people. Is it possible to arrange a catered lunch in the Paris room? Nothing too fancy, just some sandwiches and maybe a fruit platter.

Oh, and if we could have some coffee and tea available, that would be great too. Let me know what works!

Regards,

Good afternoon,

I need to organize a small networking event on March 30. We'll have about 20 attendees, including some guests from Deloitte. Can we book Training Room C from 14:00 to 18:00 and arrange a selection of finger foods and soft drinks?

I’ll send over more detailed dietary requirements soon. Appreciate the help!

Thank you.

Good morning,

We are looking to host a small brainstorming session with a few of our strategic partners on Monday, June 14. It will be a casual event, just some pastries and coffee would be fine. Can we use one of the smaller rooms, maybe A102? Looking at about 8-10 people but I will confirm the numbers shortly.

Could you also let me know what the cost would be to set this up? Thanks!

Hi Hospitality,

I hope you're doing well. I'm planning a farewell gathering for a colleague on Friday, October 23 at the Hilversum office. Expected count is around 15 people. We'll need a catered lunch and it would be great if we could book the Grand Cafe for this event.

One more thing, one of our team members is vegan, so we should have some options for them too.

Thanks a lot, and sorry for the late notice!

Hello team,

On Wednesday, February 10, we want to conduct a full day workshop for one of our tech clients. It's going to be held in the Wibaut office. Can you arrange for a training room and a light lunch with sandwiches and drinks?

I haven't finalized the number of attendees yet, but I anticipate no more than 18. Could you also have some snacks ready for the afternoon session?

Thanks in advance!

We have a last-minute request to host a small meeting next Thursday, March 5, at our Amsterdam office for our client, Appian. It would be from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM, and we expect 12 attendees in total.

Could we have a lunch with some vegetarian options, please? Also, could you check if B212 is available for this?

Thanks a lot!

We have a group visiting from our Paris office on Tuesday, July 8. We need to reserve a meeting space at the Laap location from 9 AM until 4 PM. Around 16 people are expected.

Could you also arrange for coffee and snacks throughout the day and a simple lunch around noon? There are no special dietary requirements that I'm aware of, but I will update you if needed.

Thanks for your help!

Hello Hospitality,

I hope you're doing well! On Thursday, July 15, we're planning to host an executive roundtable with a few of our key partners. It'll be in the Amsterdam office, and we've reserved the Paris room. Could you arrange for a light breakfast setup for 12 attendees? Something simple like pastries, coffee, and tea would be perfect. I will confirm the attendee list later this week.

Sorry for the late notice, but we'd need everything ready by 8:00 AM. Also, we have one attendee who requires gluten-free options.

Thanks a lot for your help!

Hi team,

On Wednesday, August 10, we have a strategy workshop scheduled with our client Shell. They're bringing along 5 colleagues. I’ve booked room 3.02 from 2 PM to 5 PM. Could we get some sandwiches and coffee for around 15 people?

Apologies for the last-minute request; I've been swamped with other planning details. If you need more info, please let me know.

Thanks!

Good morning,

On Monday, September 5, we are hosting a knowledge-sharing session at the Hilversum office. We expect around 20 participants, mostly internal, but a few partners will join as well.

Can you arrange for a catered lunch? Sandwiches and a salad bar would be great. We should also have a vegetarian option available. I'll send you the final count by next week.

Thanks for sorting this out!

We have a last-minute request for a team-building event on Friday, June 25. We're expecting about 25 people, including some colleagues from our Paris office. We'd like to use the rooftop terrace if the weather permits.

Could you organize a barbecue lunch? Also, a projector might be needed for a brief presentation.

Let me know if this is feasible. Many thanks for the help!

On Friday, October 22, we are planning a kick-off meeting for a new project with a few teammates joining remotely. We will be in the Berlin room from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

Could you please arrange for some snacks, coffee, and tea throughout the day? We don't have the exact number of attendees yet, but I'll update you as soon as I can.

Thank you, and sorry for not having all the details at the moment!

Hi Team,

We are planning a strategy session with our partner, ING, on Thursday, April 13. Could you please reserve the Amsterdam room for us from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM? We will need a lunch setup for about 15 people with some vegetarian options included. Also, can you check if a projector is available in that room, just in case we need it?

Thanks for the help, and please let me know if you need any further details. 

Best,

Hello!

I hope you're well. We're organizing a small get-together for our new hires on Monday, March 8. We'll be using the Grand Café from 2:00 to 5:00 PM. We expect around 8 people — very informal. Could we have some coffee and snacks available during this time?

Thanks so much in advance!

Dear Hospitality,

On Friday, November 15, we’ll host a brainstorming session with our client, Deloitte, in the Paris room. We anticipate about 12 attendees. Is it possible to arrange a light breakfast for them when they arrive at 9:00 AM?

Apologies for the late notice — I hope this can still be arranged. Let me know if there's anything else you need from me.

Thank you,
Robert

Good morning team,

Quick question: we're hosting a training day for internal staff on Wednesday, August 23, in room B203, but we haven't yet decided whether we need lunch or not. Could you tentatively reserve a lunch for around 18 people? I will confirm by Monday next week once we have a clearer idea.

Thanks for your patience!

Best,
Anna

Next Tuesday, we're expecting a visit from our partner, Salesforce, for an afternoon session. We will need the training room A101 from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM. Could you also arrange a coffee and tea service for around 20 people, please?

By the way, I might have more specifics on dietary needs soon.

Thanks a lot,
Marco

Hi Team,

I'm organizing a quick strategy catch-up on March 15th. We would like to hold it in one of the smaller rooms, preferably Room B211, if it's available from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM. There will be about 8 people, just our core team.

Could you arrange for some light snacks and coffee? Also, if you have details on any room availability, do share. I might have forgotten to check the new booking system, sorry about that!

Additionally, it would be great to have some water and tea available throughout the meeting. I will confirm dietary restrictions by next week.

Apologies for the late notice, but could you help arrange a breakfast setup for a small team meeting on April 22nd? We will start with a breakfast at 8:30 AM in the Grand Café and then use Room 3.02 for our discussions until noon.

Expecting around 10 people. If possible, could you include pastries and fruit in the breakfast spread? Let me know if this can be accommodated.

Good afternoon,

We have planned a project review session on July 9th at the Amsterdam office. We'll need a room like A302 from 2 PM to 5 PM for about 15 people.

It would be great to have coffee and snacks available, but I'll get back to you about any special dietary needs. Could you also check if we can have a projector set up?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Hi Team,

I'm looking to organize a small workshop on August 3rd. Very informal, about 6 of us, but we might have 2 guests joining. Can we use any available space in the Hilversum office in the morning? Ideally from 9:00 AM to noon.

Could we also get some sandwiches and drinks? I'll confirm any dietary restrictions shortly.

Sorry for the vagueness, just trying to sort out all details. Appreciate your support!

Hello team,

I hope this finds you well. On Wednesday, July 22, we plan to host an internal workshop for our DevOps team. We would love to have it at the Hilversum office. Is there availability for a training room from 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM? 

We'll need lunch for about 18 people, preferably salads and sandwiches. I believe one of our team members is vegan, so let's keep that in mind.

Could you also check if a projector is available? Thank you in advance, and apologies for the short notice on this one!

We're looking to organize a partner meeting with AWS on Friday, August 7th. It will take place in the Wibaut office. Can you please reserve a room suitable for about 12 attendees from 11:00 AM to 3:00 PM?

Lunch should be arranged as well, and it would be great to have a mix of wraps and fruit platters. I'll confirm dietary restrictions later as I'm still waiting to hear back from a few attendees.

Cheers,

Hi Hospitality,

I need your assistance with arranging a team-building session on Monday, September 14. We are expecting around 25 people and plan to start at 2:00 PM. Could you reserve the Bangalore room for the afternoon?

We won't need a full meal, just some snacks and drinks around 4:00 PM. Any suggestions on what would work best?

Thanks in advance for your support. Please let me know if additional details are required.

Regards,

Dear Team,

I'm writing to request a room for a client meeting with ING scheduled for Thursday, October 15th. We will host them at our Amsterdam office. Could you arrange the Paris room from 1:00 PM until 5:00 PM?

We anticipate about 15 attendees. Could we have a catered lunch including some vegetarian options? Also, can we have a setup with chairs in a semicircle for the discussion?

Best,

The session will run from 14:00 to 18:00, and we would like to have some light refreshments, maybe sandwiches and drinks.

I'll confirm any dietary requirements shortly. Please let me know if this can be accommodated.

Hi there,
